data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the status lifecycle for various states, but the evidence provided does not include any information regarding the lifecycle statuses of the consequence rows or their linkage to the required states. The linked use case specifies the need for a status lifecycle, yet there is no evidence demonstrating that this requirement has been fulfilled. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence provided.
gaps: No evidence of status lifecycle for planned/applied/failed/reverted/cancelled.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for status lifecycle validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the status lifecycle for consequence rows.
